commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And unto Sarah he said, Behold, I have given your brother a thousand pieces of silver: behold, he is to you a vindication of the eyes, unto all that are with you, and with all others: thus she was righted. Thy brother, as thou hast agreed to call thy husband. Pieces, or sicles of silver, worth a little above 2s. each; total £113 sterling. A covering, or veil, to show thou art married, and prevent thee from being taken by any one hereafter. It was to be so rich, that all might know her quality. Paul (1 Corinthians xi. ) orders women to be covered.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
